title: Mr. S / The Smuggling Web
bodyText:
The S-crest bag; the S-marked corpses; **the mark was a tracker** (Spells removed it, S18); Trunks' vials (Spells co-created); the smuggling ring; the F & B chairmanship; the secret weapon + open **wish** to Felson; and the kill shot: **"Our business is over"** — Spells canceling Root's Misty Step (S20).

# The open questions
What was the Root business? What does Spells actually move through the smuggling ring — and did the dig serve it? What does he want with Felson? Why is a 2,000-year-old reformed dhampir collecting board seats?

> [!dm] He has gone from background lore to the campaign's active broker in four sessions. Decide his want before the party gets back from the pool.
